channel.title: Posts on My Project Addiction
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on My Project Addiction

item.title: Documenting projects by adding another project...
item.description: I enjoy projects. Projects are my way of being creative and my outlet to fuel my need to learn new things! But i have a problem… I tend to have a lot of projects going on at the same time. Projects of all different sizes, from quick projects that only take a couple hours to projects that are on going over years (I guess those would be more often named hobbies?
